sections.paragraph: an unused root, i.q. Arab. جَبَأَ to go out from the earth, as a serpent from its hiding place; hence جَاب for جَابِىءُ locusts, so called as issuing from the earth when hatched; comp. Eth. አነበጣ፡ a very large locust, from ذبط to emerge from the water, comp. Plin. xi. 29, § 35. Bochart, Hieroz, ii. p. 443. Hence גֵּב No. II, גֹּוב.
